title: Blechnum colensoi
taxonomy: Blechnum colensoi is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The classification of Blechnum colensoi is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Blechnales, Family: Blechnaceae, Genus: Blechnum, Species: B. colensoi. uses: Blechnum colensoi is also known as Colenso's chain fern or New Zealand chain fern.
